metadata.description: EU4 and HOI4 script index tooling: the eu4-indexer Claude Code plugin (MCP server + per-game guided skills).

plugins.name: eu4-indexer
plugins.description: Query and reason over a Europa Universalis IV or Hearts of Iron IV script index: explain events/missions/decisions/focuses, trace what triggers what, find bugs, and plan how to reach a goal. Bundles the MCP server and per-game guided skills.
